pi_items.source: Verified via setup_medintux.sh which creates database 'DrTuxTest' and loads Dump_DrTuxTest.sql from official MedinTux installer
Task description explicitly requires creation of view named 'vue_patients_complete'. Verified in task.json description field.
Verified against task description which specifies these 11 exact column aliases with their source tables (IndexNomPrenom, fchpat) and calculated column (age_annees using TIMESTAMPDIFF)

privileged_info_summary: Task creates a SQL VIEW named 'vue_patients_complete' in the 'DrTuxTest' database. The database is loaded from the official MedinTux 2.16 installer's SQL dump (Dump_DrTuxTest.sql) and supplemented with synthetic test patient records. The view joins two tables (IndexNomPrenom and fchpat) and includes PII columns (names, birth dates, addresses, phone numbers, social security numbers) with all data being synthetic/demo data not sourced from real patients. The required column set consists of 11 specific aliases matching demographic and contact information fields.
